coverage_map.unrestricted global search on declared b: covered by independent raw-primitive reconstruction and objective/parameter agreement
coverage_map.every conditional optimum on evaluated d: covered independently at all 27 values; objective and set membership compared
coverage_map.selected-only policy image: covered by independent remapping of each independently selected conditional optimum
coverage_map.constraint/KKT acceptance: covered with analytic projected gradients in production and finite-difference KKT in verifier
coverage_map.holes, grid censoring, and closed suppor: covered mechanically in both implementations and reconciled; delta=0 is support-bounded, not grid-censored
coverage_map.sample construction: covered only for expected-versus-realized row count and declared x support
coverage_map.population identification on continuous: UNVERIFIED; grid separation and sample likelihood geometry do not prove it
coverage_map.counterfactual external validity at poli: UNVERIFIED; this is model-based extrapolation beyond observed x=1.60
coverage_map.frequentist LR coverage in this finite m: UNVERIFIED; chi-square cutoff is a reference approximation, not Monte Carlo validated here
coverage_map.welfare: NOT CLAIMED; adoption probability is not social welfare

branch_rule.continue: all required checks pass, no holes, and neither endpoint is censored
branch_rule.refine: any reported-set endpoint is censored or a grid hole remains
branch_rule.backtrack: unrestricted/conditional reconstruction, KKT acceptance, likelihood agreement, or membership comparison fails
